hero_title: Reduce False Positives in KYT Alerts
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams filter wallet and transaction alerts by consolidating multi-provider risk signals into structured, audit-ready workflows that reduce manual reviews and noise.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT alert noise slows case reviews
problem_description: Compliance teams face high volumes of false positive alerts that create manual review bottlenecks and inconsistent risk assessments. This overload reduces operational efficiency and makes it harder to build a clear audit trail for transaction monitoring decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, provider risk signals and transaction data into structured cases that streamline review workflows and preserve audit evidence for clear, consistent decision-making.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY filters wallet risk alerts through rules and triage to structure cases with review evidence for clearer decision making and regulatory audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented KYT alerts into structured cases with linked decisions and preserved evidence, reducing noise while supporting audit-ready transaction monitoring workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs reducing false positives by connecting provider outputs, preserving audit evidence, and enabling controlled deployment for scalable transaction monitoring workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce false positive alerts?
faq_1_answer: SFTY aggregates KYT alerts from multiple providers, applies consistent risk rules and workflows, and filters noise to reduce false positives while improving triage efficiency.
faq_2_question: How are KYT alerts routed and triaged?
faq_2_answer: Alerts are routed into structured workflows based on configurable risk thresholds, jurisdiction, and policy, enabling compliance teams to review, escalate, and resolve cases efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves alert history, case decisions, provider outputs and supporting evidence as an auditable record for regulatory review and internal compliance purposes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYT and analytics providers to connect their outputs into a single compliance workflow without disrupting current integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or analytics providers but connects their outputs into structured cases, decisions, reports and evidence for better operational control.
final_title: Bring KYT alerts into structured case workflows
final_description: See how SFTY filters wallet and transaction alerts into audit-ready cases for more efficient compliance review and risk management.
